title: Introducing Trusted Publishers
desc: PyPI's original announcement explaining Trusted Publishing and OIDC-based uploads.

title: PyPI now supports digital attestations
desc: Announcement of PEP 740 attestation support on PyPI, building on Trusted Publishing.

title: New OIDC providers for Trusted Publishing
desc: Discussion on expanding Trusted Publishing beyond GitHub Actions to other CI providers.

title: OpenSSF: Trusted Publishers for All Package Repositories
desc: OpenSSF report on how Trusted Publishing works and the case for adoption across ecosystems.

title: PyPI blog: LiteLLM & Telnyx supply-chain attack incident report
desc: Official PyPI incident report covering the LiteLLM and Telnyx compromises, where leaked credentials enabled malicious package uploads. Highlights how Trusted Publishing and short-lived OIDC credentials mitigate this class of attack.

title: LiteLLM supply-chain attack via leaked PyPI credentials
desc: Attacker used leaked API token to push malicious releases. Trusted Publishing would have eliminated the stored credential.

title: Snyk: Poisoned scanner backdooring LiteLLM
desc: Snyk's technical analysis of the LiteLLM compromise and its supply-chain implications.

title: PyPI blog: Ultralytics attack analysis
desc: PyPI's post-mortem on the ultralytics compromise via GitHub Actions injection, with recommendations including Trusted Publishing.

title: Trusted Publishers — PyPI documentation
desc: Official PyPI docs on configuring Trusted Publishing for your project.

title: Adding a Trusted Publisher — PyPI documentation
desc: Step-by-step guide to registering a Trusted Publisher on PyPI.

title: Trusted Publishing internals — PyPI documentation
desc: How Trusted Publishing works under the hood, including how to become an OIDC provider.

title: Trusted Publishing security model — PyPI documentation
desc: PyPI's explanation of the security properties and threat model for Trusted Publishing.

title: Digital attestations — PyPI documentation
desc: Build artifact attestations produced automatically when uploading via Trusted Publishing.

title: Publishing with GitHub Actions CI/CD — Python Packaging Guide
desc: The Python Packaging Authority's guide to setting up Trusted Publishing with GitHub Actions.

title: pypa/gh-action-pypi-publish
desc: The official PyPA GitHub Action for publishing to PyPI, with built-in Trusted Publishing support.

title: GitHub: Immutable releases
desc: GitHub's documentation on immutable releases with automatic attestation generation.

title: Are we PEP 740 yet?
desc: Trail of Bits tracker showing which top PyPI packages have adopted PEP 740 attestations.

title: zizmor — GitHub Actions security auditor
desc: Static analysis tool for finding security issues in GitHub Actions workflows. Catches misconfigurations that Trusted Publishing helps mitigate.

title: black: Switch to Trusted Publishing (PR #4611)
desc: Reference implementation — black's pull request switching to Trusted Publishing, cited by PyPA as an example.

title: tenacity: Release workflow with uv + Trusted Publishing
desc: Clean, minimal example of a Trusted Publishing workflow using uv.

title: idna: Deploy workflow with test PyPI + Trusted Publishing
desc: Example workflow that publishes to both test PyPI and production PyPI using Trusted Publishing.

title: Top PyPI Packages by downloads
desc: Hugo van Kemenade's dataset of the most-downloaded PyPI packages — the basis for Trusty Pub's tracking.

title: RubyGems: Trusted Publishing
desc: RubyGems' adoption of the same Trusted Publishing model, showing cross-ecosystem momentum.
